comment.body:
why? 
bcs OTM calls are decaying due to time, spot and vol as well intraday. 
puts are naturally printing as the "market wants down", but its a crowded trade, not necessary fast enough.
while intraday mean reversion calls print fast

comment.body:
Hi Alma,  Thank you for all your updates.  I still have a basic question.  Where can we get the data for long-call / short-call long-put / short-put.  All of the calculations depend on that.  

Open interest isn't enough unless I'm missing something.  Who is marking the portions of the open interest as a remaining short vs long.  

In all the charm/vanna speed discussions we depend on that.

Am i missing something?  

I just bought option depth but where do they get their data for the position data.
